_meta.author: mikolajdobrucki
_meta.title: Glow
_meta.description:
A collection of demos showcasing different use cases for the Glow component:
	1.	GlowBasic
	▪	Basic implementation with top positioning
	▪	Demonstrates default animation
	2.	GlowCentered
	▪	Centered glow effect
	▪	Shows pulse animation
	3.	GlowMultiple
	▪	Multiple glow effects combined
	▪	Demonstrates layering capabilities
	4.	GlowInteractive
	▪	Interactive hover effects
	▪	Shows transition animations
